meta.name: Innovative EcoSystems Index Registry
meta.description: Master registry of all global indices used to power the IEPA (Innovative EcoSystems Prosperity Algorithm). Each index is mapped to an IEPA Foundation Factor, weighted, tagged, and enriched with available data years for historical loading (2020–2024).

changelog.v2.0.0: Added 58 new indices across all IEPA factors. Added data_years field to all entries for 2020-2024 historical data pipeline. Enhanced schema with improved coverage metadata.

indices.name: Global Innovation Index
indices.notes: 7 pillars covering institutions, human capital, infrastructure, market sophistication, business sophistication, knowledge outputs, and creative outputs. Most trusted global innovation benchmark.

indices.name: Bloomberg Innovation Index
indices.notes: Covers R&D intensity, manufacturing value-add, productivity, high-tech density, tertiary education, and patent activity.

indices.name: Global Competitiveness Index
indices.notes: 12 pillars. Institutions, infrastructure, ICT adoption, macroeconomic stability, health, skills, product market, labour market, financial system, market size, business dynamism, and innovation.

indices.name: Network Readiness Index
indices.notes: Technology, people, governance, and impact pillars. Strong digital infrastructure signal.

indices.name: IMD World Digital Competitiveness Ranking
indices.notes: Knowledge, technology, and future readiness. Strong signal for digital ecosystem maturity.

indices.name: Government AI Readiness Index
indices.notes: Government, technology sector, and data & infrastructure pillars. Increasingly critical for FDI conversations.

indices.name: ICT Development Index
indices.notes: Covers ICT access, use, and skills. Important baseline for emerging market digital infrastructure.

indices.name: Global Cybersecurity Index
indices.notes: Legal, technical, organizational, capacity development, and cooperation pillars.

indices.name: WIPO Patent Statistics
indices.notes: Raw patent filing data by country. Strong proxy for commercializable innovation output.

indices.name: Main Science & Technology Indicators
indices.notes: R&D expenditure, personnel, and output data. Best source for R&D intensity (R&D as % of GDP).

indices.name: Global Skills Report
indices.notes: Business, technology, and data science skill penetration by country. Good emerging market signal.

indices.name: Technology Frontier Index
indices.notes: Technology adoption rates and frontier technology deployment across emerging and advanced economies.

indices.name: Global Entrepreneurship Index
indices.notes: 14 pillars across entrepreneurial attitudes, abilities, and aspirations. Best available global entrepreneurship composite.

indices.name: Global Startup Ecosystem Report
indices.notes: City-level ecosystem rankings. Performance, funding, market reach, talent, and connectedness. Critical for Tier 1 market benchmarking.

indices.name: World Bank Business Ready
indices.notes: Replaced Doing Business. Regulatory framework, public services, and operational efficiency pillars. Strong ease-of-doing-business signal.

indices.name: Global Entrepreneurship Monitor
indices.notes: Survey-based. Early-stage entrepreneurial activity, motivational index, societal attitudes. Best longitudinal entrepreneurship survey.

indices.name: Venture Pulse Report
indices.notes: VC deal flow, funding by stage, and sector. Best freely available VC activity tracker by country.

indices.name: Global Findex Database
indices.notes: Financial inclusion — account ownership, savings, borrowing, payments. Proxy for access to capital for founders.

indices.name: SME Competitiveness Index
indices.notes: Compete, connect, and change pillars for SMEs. Strong signal for scale-up pathway quality.

indices.name: Female Entrepreneurship Index
indices.notes: 3 pillars: entrepreneurial environment, ecosystem, and aspiration. Important inclusion signal for emerging markets.

indices.name: Impact Investing Landscape Report
indices.notes: Impact capital flows and market maturity. Strong signal for emerging market investment readiness.

indices.name: Most Innovative Companies
indices.notes: Corporate innovation capacity and culture index. Proxy for private sector innovation absorption.

indices.name: Global Startup Ecosystem Rankings
indices.notes: VC-backed startup valuations, unicorn counts, and ecosystem growth rates. Best real-time funding data.

indices.name: Global Peace Index
indices.notes: Ongoing conflict, safety and security, and militarisation pillars. Critical guardrail variable in IEPA.

indices.name: Environmental Performance Index
indices.notes: 40 performance indicators across 11 issue categories in ecosystem vitality and environmental health.

indices.name: Human Development Index
indices.notes: Health, education, and living standards composite. Foundational human capital baseline.

indices.name: Social Progress Index
indices.notes: Basic human needs, wellbeing, and opportunity pillars. Non-economic resilience signal.

indices.name: Corruption Perceptions Index
indices.notes: Perceived levels of public sector corruption. Strong institutional trust and FDI deterrent signal.

indices.name: Rule of Law Index
indices.notes: 8 factors: constraints on government powers, absence of corruption, open government, fundamental rights, order & security, regulatory enforcement, civil justice, criminal justice.

indices.name: Fragile States Index
indices.notes: 12 indicators of state fragility. Key inverse guardrail for IEPA — high fragility penalizes score.

indices.name: Democracy Index
indices.notes: Electoral process, civil liberties, political participation, political culture, functioning of government.

indices.name: Freedom in the World
indices.notes: Political rights and civil liberties. Complements Democracy Index with broader country coverage.

indices.name: Sustainable Development Goals Index
indices.notes: Progress across all 17 SDGs. Comprehensive sustainability and resilience baseline.

indices.name: Energy Transition Index
indices.notes: Energy system performance and transition readiness. Critical for long-term resilience and ESG-aligned FDI.

indices.name: Gender Inequality Index
indices.notes: Health, empowerment, and labour market dimensions. Social cohesion signal for inclusive ecosystem development.

indices.name: Climate Change Vulnerability Index
indices.notes: Physical climate risk exposure. Growing FDI consideration, especially for infrastructure-heavy investment.

indices.name: Social Cohesion Index
indices.notes: Social relations, connectedness, and focus on the common good. Underutilized but powerful signal.

indices.name: Government Effectiveness (WGI)
indices.notes: Part of Worldwide Governance Indicators. Quality of public services, civil service, policy formulation. Core alignment proxy.

indices.name: Regulatory Quality (WGI)
indices.notes: Ability of government to formulate and implement sound policies enabling private sector development.

indices.name: Index of Economic Freedom
indices.notes: 12 freedoms across rule of law, government size, regulatory efficiency, and market openness.

indices.name: OGP Country Performance
indices.notes: Government transparency, accountability, and civic participation commitments. Strong alignment signal.

indices.name: Trade Facilitation Index
indices.notes: 11 policy areas for border crossing procedures. Key metric for market access and trade alignment.

indices.name: Infrascope PPP Readiness Index
indices.notes: Regulatory framework, institutional capacity, investment climate for PPP. Especially relevant for IE's government clients.

indices.name: Paying Taxes Report
indices.notes: Total tax rate, time to comply, and post-filing processes. Key friction signal for entrepreneurs and investors.

indices.name: Public Sector Innovation Facets
indices.notes: Government's capacity to innovate. Measures mission-oriented, enhancement, adaptive, and anticipatory innovation.

indices.name: Global Talent Competitiveness Index
indices.notes: Enable, attract, grow, retain, vocational, and global knowledge skills pillars. Critical talent mobility signal.

indices.name: University-Industry Collaboration Index
indices.notes: Drawn from GCI data. Measures collaboration in R&D between universities and businesses.

indices.name: KOF Globalisation Index
indices.notes: Economic, social, and political globalisation dimensions. Strong proxy for market openness and international alignment.

indices.name: FDI Confidence Index
indices.notes: C-suite survey of top FDI destination intentions. Leading indicator of capital flow direction. Key IEPA accelerator input.

indices.name: World Investment Report
indices.notes: Definitive annual FDI statistics and trends. Inflows, outflows, greenfield, M&A by country and sector.

indices.name: World Bank FDI Inflows
indices.notes: Net FDI inflows as % of GDP. Standard World Bank data series. Longitudinal comparison baseline.

indices.name: Logistics Performance Index
indices.notes: Customs, infrastructure, international shipments, logistics quality, tracking, timeliness. Market access proxy.

indices.name: Emerging Market Potential Index
indices.notes: Market size, growth rate, intensity, consumption capacity, commercial infrastructure, receptivity, country risk, and economic freedom.

indices.name: Special Economic Zones Performance
indices.notes: SEZ governance, incentive structure, and performance. Directly relevant for IE's government advisory clients.

indices.name: Global Real Estate Transparency Index
indices.notes: Investment performance measurement, market fundamentals, governance, regulatory, transaction process, sustainability.

indices.name: Infrastructure Quality Index (GCR)
indices.notes: Transport, utility, and connectivity infrastructure quality. Core physical infrastructure signal for FDI attraction.

indices.name: International Tax Competitiveness Index
indices.notes: Corporate tax, individual tax, consumption tax, property tax, international rules. Important for investment climate framing.

indices.name: Expat Insider Rankings
indices.notes: Quality of life, ease of settling in, working abroad, personal finance, and expat essentials. Talent mobility proxy.

indices.name: Market Size Index (GCR)
indices.notes: Domestic and foreign market size pillar from GCR. Proxy for scale opportunity available to ecosystem participants.

indices.name: Global Sustainable Competitiveness Index
indices.notes: Natural capital, resource efficiency, intellectual capital, governance, social cohesion, economic sustainability. Broad long-term prosperity outcome measure.

indices.name: World Economic Outlook GDP Data
indices.notes: GDP growth, forecasts, and structural economic data. Primary outcome validation variable for IEPA.

indices.name: World Employment and Social Outlook
indices.notes: Employment rates, job quality, and labor market trends. Job creation is a core IEPA outcome metric.

indices.name: Global Unicorn Club Data
indices.notes: Number of unicorns by country and city. Scalable company creation is a direct IEPA outcome KPI.

indices.name: Poverty & Inequality Platform
indices.notes: Poverty headcount ratios and inequality (Gini). Broad prosperity outcome beyond GDP.

indices.name: Multidimensional Poverty Index
indices.notes: Health, education, and living standards deprivations. Captures poverty beyond income. Relevant for emerging market baseline.

indices.name: Better Life Index
indices.notes: 11 dimensions: housing, income, jobs, community, education, environment, civic engagement, health, life satisfaction, safety, work-life balance.

indices.name: Inclusive Development Index
indices.notes: Growth, inclusion, and intergenerational equity pillars. Directly aligned with IE's definition of sustainable prosperity.

indices.name: Global Retirement Index
indices.notes: Finances in retirement, material wellbeing, health, and quality of life. Long-term prosperity signal.

indices.name: Global Trends: Forced Displacement
indices.notes: Refugees and displaced populations by country. Extreme stability signal for high-risk market analysis.

indices.name: Human Capital Index
indices.notes: Child survival, expected years of school, harmonized test scores, adult survival, healthy growth. Education-workforce pipeline signal.

indices.name: QS World University Rankings
indices.notes: Academic reputation, employer reputation, citations, faculty/student ratio, international diversity, sustainability. Talent production proxy.

indices.name: World Press Freedom Index
indices.notes: Political context, legal framework, economic context, sociocultural context, and safety. Information environment signal.

indices.name: Global Food Security Index
indices.notes: Affordability, availability, quality and safety, and sustainability. Base resilience layer for emerging markets.

indices.name: Aqueduct Water Risk Atlas
indices.notes: Water stress, depletion, variability, and quality. Long-term physical resilience, critical for infrastructure-heavy FDI sectors.

indices.name: Global Health Security Index
indices.notes: Prevention, detection, response, health system, norms compliance, risk environment. Post-COVID risk management baseline.

indices.name: Youth Development Index
indices.notes: Education, employment, health, civic participation, and political participation for youth. Long-term human capital pipeline.

indices.name: Open Data Barometer
indices.notes: Government data openness, readiness, and implementation impact. Digital governance alignment signal.

indices.name: IMD World Competitiveness Ranking
indices.notes: Economic performance, government efficiency, business efficiency, and infrastructure. Comprehensive senior-audience credibility.

indices.name: PISA Education Rankings
indices.notes: Math, reading, and science scores for 15-year-olds. Long-range innovation talent pipeline signal.

indices.name: TIMSS International Rankings
indices.notes: Math and science achievement at grades 4 and 8. STEM pipeline indicator for future innovation workforce.

indices.name: Inclusive Internet Index
indices.notes: Availability, affordability, relevance, and readiness pillars. Digital inclusion as innovation baseline.

indices.name: International IP Index
indices.notes: Patents, copyrights, trademarks, trade secrets, enforcement, international treaties. IP protection critical for innovation commercialization.

indices.name: Entrepreneurship at a Glance
indices.notes: Business creation and destruction rates, enterprise characteristics, growth ambitions, and innovation outputs.

indices.name: Travel and Tourism Competitiveness Index
indices.notes: Enabling environment, T&T policy, infrastructure, natural and cultural resources. Soft power and FDI attraction signal.

indices.name: OECD FDI Restrictiveness Index
indices.notes: Foreign equity limits, screening and approval, restrictions on key personnel, and operational restrictions. Inverse signal — lower = more open.

indices.name: fDi Markets Greenfield FDI Tracker
indices.notes: Greenfield project announcements by country, sector, and capital expenditure. Most granular FDI tracking available.

indices.name: Investment Climate Assessments
indices.notes: Country-level investment climate reform assessments. Direct policy advisory intelligence for IE's government clients.

indices.name: Country Risk & Business Climate Assessments
indices.notes: Country risk (A1-E) and business climate grades. Quick-reference risk signal for corporate clients considering market entry.

indices.name: EIU Country Risk Service
indices.notes: Sovereign, currency, banking, political, economic structure, and country risk scores. Premium signal for enterprise FDI advisory.

indices.name: PCT Patent Applications
indices.notes: International patent applications filed under PCT. High-quality innovation commercialization signal.

indices.name: Financial Soundness Indicators
indices.notes: Bank capital adequacy, asset quality, earnings, liquidity. Financial system resilience signal.

indices.name: Worldwide Governance Indicators
indices.notes: Full WGI composite across voice & accountability, political stability, government effectiveness, regulatory quality, rule of law, control of corruption.

indices.name: Digital Government Index
indices.notes: Digital by design, data-driven public sector, government as a platform, open by default, user-driven, proactiveness. Gov-tech alignment indicator.

indices.name: Innovation Ecosystems Report
indices.notes: WEF's own innovation ecosystem framework across policy, talent, capital, and infrastructure dimensions. Direct comp to IE methodology.

indices.name: Startup Policy Benchmarking
indices.notes: Startup policy frameworks across regulatory simplification, access to finance, markets, awareness and capabilities, and international linkages.

indices.name: Global Gender Gap Index
indices.notes: Economic participation, educational attainment, health, and political empowerment gender parity. Inclusive ecosystem signal.

indices.name: Readiness for the Future of Production
indices.notes: Technology and innovation, human capital, global trade and investment, institutional framework, sustainable resources, demand environment.

indices.name: UN E-Government Survey
indices.notes: Online service index, telecom infrastructure index, human capital index. Broadest government digital service coverage globally.

indices.name: Global Foreign Investment Sustainability Index
indices.notes: Sustainable investment framework alignment. ESG-aligned FDI signal increasingly demanded by sovereign wealth funds.

indices.name: Doing Business Historical Archive
indices.notes: Historical longitudinal data pre-2021. Valuable for backtesting IEPA algorithm against historical ecosystem development trajectories.

indices.name: MSCI ESG Country Scores
indices.notes: Environmental, social, governance scores used by institutional investors. Increasingly drives FDI capital allocation.

indices.name: Investment Freedom Index
indices.notes: Sub-component of Economic Freedom Index. Capital flows, foreign investment code, restrictions, expropriation, and foreign exchange.

indices.name: BSA Global Cloud Computing Scorecard
indices.notes: IT readiness, legal framework, data privacy, cybersecurity, cloud promotion policies. Digital infrastructure readiness.

indices.name: Product Market Regulation Index
indices.notes: State control, barriers to entrepreneurship, and barriers to trade and investment. Deep regulatory alignment structural signal.

indices.name: Technology and Innovation Report
indices.notes: Frontier technologies and their impact on developing countries. UNCTAD Readiness Index sub-component. Emerging market tech gap analysis.

indices.name: Stanford AI Index Report
indices.notes: Comprehensive AI progress metrics: research output, R&D investment, talent, policy. Key benchmark for AI ecosystem maturity.

indices.name: Global AI Index
indices.notes: Measures AI implementation, innovation, and investment across 62 countries. Strong emerging market coverage.

indices.name: OECD Science, Technology and Innovation Outlook
indices.notes: Deep dive into STI policy trends, megatrends, and national innovation system benchmarks. Biennial.

indices.name: WIPO Technology Trends
indices.notes: Tracks emerging technology patent trends by country. AI, blockchain, climate tech coverage.

indices.name: SCImago Journal & Country Rank
indices.notes: Scientific output and citation impact by country. Key proxy for research capacity and knowledge production.

indices.name: Digital Development Dashboard
indices.notes: Broadband penetration, mobile subscriptions, internet access. Successor metrics to ICT Development Index.

indices.name: Future of Jobs Report
indices.notes: Forecasts skill transitions, automation exposure, and future workforce needs by industry and country.

indices.name: Education at a Glance
indices.notes: Tertiary attainment, STEM graduation rates, public education spending. Critical for talent pipeline assessment.

indices.name: Global Startup Ecosystem Report — Emerging Markets Supplement
indices.notes: Top 30 global ecosystems plus emerging hubs. Funding, exits, talent, connectedness metrics.

indices.name: Crunchbase Emerging Market Startup Activity
indices.notes: Company formation, funding rounds, investor activity by country. Most granular startup data source globally.

indices.name: PitchBook Emerging Market VC Report
indices.notes: VC investment flows, deal counts, exit activity. Complements Crunchbase for cross-validation.

indices.name: Global Social Business Initiative Index
indices.notes: Social enterprise activity and impact investing environment. Relevant for inclusive innovation measurement.

indices.name: Financing SMEs and Entrepreneurs Scoreboard
indices.notes: SME access to credit, equity, and alternative finance. Key proxy for entrepreneurship enabling environment.

indices.name: MSME Finance Gap Report
indices.notes: Estimates unmet MSME finance needs by country. Critical for understanding entrepreneurship barriers in emerging markets.

indices.name: AfricArena / Disrupt Africa / Tech In Asia Ecosystem Trackers
indices.notes: Regional startup trackers for Africa and Southeast Asia. Complements global indices with ground-level data.

indices.name: World Bank Enterprise Surveys
indices.notes: Firm-level survey data on business climate obstacles: access to finance, corruption, infrastructure, regulation.

indices.name: Notre Dame Global Adaptation Initiative Country Index
indices.notes: Dual measure: climate vulnerability (6 sectors) and readiness (economic, governance, social). Essential for resilience factor.

indices.name: INFORM Risk Index
indices.notes: Composite humanitarian risk: hazard/exposure, vulnerability, coping capacity. Used by UN agencies.

indices.name: WHO World Health Statistics
indices.notes: Life expectancy, health system coverage, UHC index, mortality rates. Foundational resilience health metrics.

indices.name: World Risk Index
indices.publisher: Bündnis Entwicklung Hilft / Ruhr University Bochum
indices.notes: Disaster risk index combining exposure to natural hazards with societal vulnerability and coping capacity.

indices.name: Climate Change Performance Index
indices.notes: GHG emissions, renewable energy, energy efficiency, climate policy. Key for green economy readiness assessment.

indices.name: Ecological Threat Report
indices.notes: Ecological threats (food insecurity, water stress, natural disasters) combined with peace/resilience capacity.

indices.name: Global Social Mobility Index
indices.notes: 5 pillars: health, education, technology access, work opportunities, working conditions, fair wages, social protection.

indices.name: World Inequality Database
indices.notes: Income and wealth inequality data including pre/post-tax distributions. Critical for inclusive growth assessment.

indices.name: Melbourne Mercer Global Pension Index
indices.notes: Pension system adequacy, sustainability, integrity. Proxy for long-term social resilience and workforce security.

indices.name: Global Burden of Disease Study
indices.notes: Disease burden, mortality, disability-adjusted life years (DALYs) by country. Most comprehensive global health dataset.

indices.name: Voice & Accountability (WGI)
indices.notes: Perceptions of citizen participation in government, freedom of expression, media freedom.

indices.name: Political Stability & Absence of Violence (WGI)
indices.notes: Probability of politically motivated violence or government destabilization. Critical for investment environment.

indices.name: Control of Corruption (WGI)
indices.notes: Extent to which public power is exercised for private gain. Complements CPI with World Bank methodology.

indices.name: Government at a Glance
indices.notes: Public sector workforce, budget transparency, digital government, regulatory quality across OECD + partner countries.

indices.name: Government Defence Integrity Index
indices.notes: Defence sector governance integrity. Relevant for IE markets with high defense spending.

indices.name: Open Budget Index
indices.notes: Budget transparency, public participation, independent oversight. Aligned with Alignment factor governance sub-components.

indices.name: OECD Regulatory Policy Outlook
indices.notes: Regulatory governance, impact assessment, stakeholder engagement, international regulatory cooperation.

indices.name: UN Public Administration Country Studies
indices.notes: Country-level public administration reforms, capacity building, institutional frameworks.

indices.name: Rule of Law Index
indices.notes: 8 factors: constraints on government, absence of corruption, open government, fundamental rights, order and security, regulatory enforcement, civil justice, criminal justice.

indices.name: Governance Matters Report
indices.notes: Ibrahim Index of African Governance (IIAG). Most comprehensive African governance dataset — critical for Kenya, Morocco, Egypt.

indices.name: UNCTAD FDI Inflows by Country
indices.notes: Raw FDI inflow/outflow data by country. Most authoritative global FDI statistical series.

indices.name: UNCTAD Investment Monitor
indices.notes: Investment policy developments, BIT/FTA activity, investment promotion measures by country.

indices.name: fDi Intelligence Global FDI Trends Report
indices.notes: Greenfield FDI project tracking, sector breakdown, investment motives. Granular FT dataset.

indices.name: World Bank B-READY Business Climate Assessment
indices.notes: Successor to Doing Business. 10 topics covering business entry, location, utilities, labor, finance, dispute resolution, trade, taxation, market competition, business insolvency.

indices.name: OECD Trade Facilitation Indicators
indices.notes: Border procedures, document/time/cost measures, automated customs. Key for market access assessment.

indices.name: WTO Trade Policy Reviews
indices.notes: Comprehensive review of each country's trade policies and practices. Useful for tariff/NTB analysis.

indices.name: Investment Promotion Agency Benchmarking
indices.notes: IPA capacity, services, digital capabilities, aftercare programs. Key for IE advisory clients with IPA mandates.

indices.name: Global Finance Country Risk Ratings
indices.notes: Country risk ratings used by banking sector. Currency risk, economic risk, political risk, banking risk.

indices.name: Moody's Sovereign Credit Ratings
indices.notes: Sovereign credit ratings. Investment grade vs speculative distinction directly affects FDI attractiveness.

indices.name: S&P Global Sovereign Ratings
indices.notes: Sovereign credit ratings complementing Moody's. Cross-validate for FDI risk assessment.

indices.name: IMF Article IV Consultation Reports
indices.notes: Annual IMF bilateral surveillance. Macro outlook, policy recommendations, external sector assessment.

indices.name: MDB Investment Climate Assessments
indices.notes: Investment climate reports from regional development banks. ADB for Southeast Asia, AfDB for Africa, EBRD for Turkey.

indices.name: IMF World Economic Outlook Database
indices.notes: GDP per capita, real growth, inflation, unemployment, current account. Most authoritative macro outcome data.

indices.name: World Bank National Accounts Data
indices.notes: GDP growth, GNI per capita, gross capital formation, trade ratios. Cross-validates IMF WEO data.

indices.name: ILO ILOSTAT Labour Market Database
indices.notes: Employment by sector, wages, labor productivity, youth unemployment. Job creation outcome tracking.

indices.name: CB Insights State of Venture Report
indices.notes: Unicorn creation rate, VC investment, exits by country. Direct measure of scalable company creation.

indices.name: Global Ecosystem Value Report
indices.notes: Total ecosystem value created (exits + unicorn valuations). Direct outcome measure for IE's scalable company KPI.

indices.name: OECD Productivity Statistics
indices.notes: Labour productivity, multifactor productivity, unit labor costs. Key for sustainable economic development outcomes.

indices.name: World Happiness Report
indices.notes: Life evaluation (Cantril ladder), positive affect, social support. Wellbeing dimension of prosperity.

indices.name: World Bank Remittance Data
indices.notes: Inbound remittances as % of GDP. Diaspora capital flows — significant in Philippines, Morocco, Egypt, India.

indices.name: OECD Regional Well-being Framework
indices.notes: Sub-national wellbeing data: income, jobs, health, education, safety, civic engagement, housing, environment.

indices.name: World Bank Poverty & Shared Prosperity Report
indices.notes: Global extreme poverty rates, shared prosperity (bottom 40% income growth). Flagship World Bank poverty assessment.
